Configuration for the cc2564x target, specifying app, BSP, and build profile settings.

# Purpose
The configuration file specifies the build settings for a software project. The `target.app` key defines the application name as `app`. The `target.bsp` key sets the board support package to `@apache-mynewt-core/hw/bsp/native`, indicating the hardware abstraction layer to use. The `target.build_profile` key is set to `debug`, which configures the build process to include debugging information. These settings are used to control how the software is compiled and linked for the target environment.
